message:
fix: Handle chained comparisons in list comprehensions

Chained comparisons like `0 < x < 3` in list comprehensions were being
generated as-is, which Zig rejects (comparison operators cannot be chained).

Now delegate chained comparisons (cmp.ops.len > 1) to genCompare which
properly converts them to `((0 < x) and (x < 3))`.

Long-term fix: Check for multiple comparison operators and route to
the proper handler that generates Python-style chained comparison logic.
